description_long: This is a low-top, lace-up sneaker with a predominantly dark red upper made of what appears to be synthetic or canvas material. The shoe features a white rubber sole with visible signs of wear and dirt, suggesting regular use. The laces are also red and threaded through metal eyelets, with the tongue partially visible beneath them. On the outer side, there is a small rectangular label with the word 'SUPERGA' in red and blue, indicating the brand. The heel has a rubber patch with the brand name embossed, and the interior lining is a darker shade of red. The overall silhouette is classic and casual, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A dark red, low-top lace-up sneaker with a white rubber sole, visible brand label, and signs of regular wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red upper, white sole, and laces, with subtle creasing and wear on the midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel's rubber brand patch and the shoe's opening, showing the interior lining.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the 'SUPERGA' label and the full length of the shoe's profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe cap, lacing, and the rounded shape of the shoe's front.
attribute_logo: Rectangular 'SUPERGA' label on the outer side in red and blue; embossed rubber patch on the heel.
